  3609→+import prisma from "@/lib/db"
  3610→+
  3611→+export interface DuplicateCheckParams {
  3612→+  userId: string
  3613→+  description: string
  3614→+  amount: number
  3615→+  date: Date
  3616→+}
  3617→+
  3618→+export async function findDuplicate({
  3619→+  userId,
  3620→+  description,
  3621→+  amount,
  3622→+  date,
  3623→+}: DuplicateCheckParams) {
  3624→+  // Normalize date to start/end of day
  3625→+  const dayStart = new Date(date)
  3626→+  dayStart.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
  3627→+  const dayEnd = new Date(date)
  3628→+  dayEnd.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999)
  3629→+
  3630→+  const duplicate = await prisma.transaction.findFirst({
  3631→+    where: {
  3632→+      userId,
  3633→+      description: {
  3634→+        equals: description.trim(),
  3635→+        mode: "insensitive",
  3636→+      },
  3637→+      amount,
  3638→+      date: {
  3639→+        gte: dayStart,
  3640→+        lte: dayEnd,
  3641→+      },
  3642→+      deletedAt: null,
  3643→+    },
  3644→+  })
  3645→+
  3646→+  return duplicate
  3647→+}
  3648→+
  3649→+export async function filterDuplicates(
  3650→+  userId: string,
  3651→+  transactions: Array<{ description: string; amount: number; date: Date }>
  3652→+): Promise<{ unique: typeof transactions; duplicateCount: number }> {
  3653→+  const unique: typeof transactions = []
  3654→+  let duplicateCount = 0
  3655→+
  3656→+  for (const t of transactions) {
  3657→+    const dup = await findDuplicate({
  3658→+      userId,
  3659→+      description: t.description,
  3660→+      amount: t.amount,
  3661→+      date: t.date,
  3662→+    })
  3663→+    if (dup) {
  3664→+      duplicateCount++
  3665→+    } else {
  3666→+      unique.push(t)
  3667→+    }
  3668→+  }
  3669→+
  3670→+  return { unique, duplicateCount }
  3671→+}

  3678→+import prisma from "@/lib/db"
  3679→+import { sendMessage, type TelegramUpdate } from "./client"
  3680→+
  3681→+export async function handleUpdate(update: TelegramUpdate) {
  3682→+  const chatId =
  3683→+    update.message?.chat.id ??
  3684→+    update.callback_query?.message?.chat.id
  3685→+
  3686→+  if (!chatId) return
  3687→+
  3688→+  // Look up linked user
  3689→+  const link = await prisma.telegramLink.findUnique({
  3690→+    where: { chatId: String(chatId) },
  3691→+  })
  3692→+
  3693→+  // Handle /start command (linking) — always allowed, even without link
  3694→+  if (update.message?.text?.startsWith("/start")) {
  3695→+    const { handleStartCommand } = await import("./commands")
  3696→+    return handleStartCommand(update.message, link?.userId ?? null)
  3697→+  }
  3698→+
  3699→+  // All other commands require a linked account
  3700→+  if (!link) {
  3701→+    return sendMessage(
  3702→+      chatId,
  3703→+      "Conta não vinculada. Acesse as configurações do MyPocket para vincular sua conta."
  3704→+    )
  3705→+  }
  3706→+
  3707→+  const userId = link.userId
  3708→+
  3709→+  // Route callback queries (inline keyboard buttons)
  3710→+  if (update.callback_query) {
  3711→+    const { handleCallbackQuery } = await import("./commands")
  3712→+    return handleCallbackQuery(update.callback_query, userId)
  3713→+  }
  3714→+
  3715→+  // Route text messages
  3716→+  if (update.message?.text) {
  3717→+    const text = update.message.text
  3718→+
  3719→+    if (text === "/menu") {
  3720→+      const { handleMenuCommand } = await import("./commands")
  3721→+      return handleMenuCommand(chatId, userId)
  3722→+    }
  3723→+
  3724→+    if (text === "/desvincular") {
  3725→+      const { handleUnlinkCommand } = await import("./commands")
  3726→+      return handleUnlinkCommand(chatId, userId)
  3727→+    }
  3728→+
  3729→+    // Default: try to parse as expense
  3730→+    const { handleExpenseMessage } = await import("./commands")
  3731→+    return handleExpenseMessage(update.message, userId)
  3732→+  }
  3733→+
  3734→+  // Route document messages (CSV files)
  3735→+  if (update.message?.document) {
  3736→+    const { handleDocumentMessage } = await import("./commands")
  3737→+    return handleDocumentMessage(update.message, userId)
  3738→+  }
  3739→+}

  4067→+import prisma from "@/lib/db"
  4068→+import {
  4069→+  sendMessage,
  4070→+  answerCallbackQuery,
  4071→+  editMessageText,
  4072→+  getFile,

  4074→+  type TelegramMessage,

  4078→+import { parseExpenseMessage } from "./parser"
  4079→+import { parseCSV } from "@/lib/csv-parser"
  4080→+import { suggestCategory } from "@/lib/categorizer"
  4081→+import { findDuplicate } from "@/lib/dedup"
  4082→+import { formatCurrency } from "@/lib/utils"
  4083→+import {
  4084→+  handleSummaryQuery,
  4085→+  handleCategoryQuery,
  4086→+  handleTransactionsQuery,
  4087→+} from "./queries"
  4088→+
  4089→+export async function handleStartCommand(
  4090→+  message: TelegramMessage,
  4091→+  existingUserId: string | null
  4092→+) {
  4093→+  const chatId = message.chat.id
  4094→+  const text = message.text || ""
  4095→+  const token = text.replace("/start", "").trim()
  4096→+
  4097→+  if (!token) {
  4098→+    if (existingUserId) {
  4099→+      return sendMessage(
  4100→+        chatId,
  4101→+        "Sua conta já está vinculada! Envie /menu para ver as opções."
  4102→+      )
  4103→+    }
  4104→+    return sendMessage(
  4105→+      chatId,
  4106→+      "Bem-vindo ao MyPocket Bot!\n\nPara vincular sua conta, acesse Configurações > Telegram no app e clique em \"Vincular Telegram\"."
  4107→+    )
  4108→+  }
  4109→+
  4110→+  // Validate token
  4111→+  const linkToken = await prisma.telegramLinkToken.findUnique({
  4112→+    where: { token },
  4113→+  })
  4114→+
  4115→+  if (!linkToken) {
  4116→+    return sendMessage(chatId, "Token inválido. Gere um novo link nas configurações do app.")
  4117→+  }
  4118→+
  4119→+  if (linkToken.expiresAt < new Date()) {
  4120→+    await prisma.telegramLinkToken.delete({ where: { id: linkToken.id } })
  4121→+    return sendMessage(chatId, "Token expirado. Gere um novo link nas configurações do app.")
  4122→+  }
  4123→+
  4124→+  // Check if chatId already linked to another account
  4125→+  const existingChatLink = await prisma.telegramLink.findUnique({
  4126→+    where: { chatId: String(chatId) },
  4127→+  })
  4128→+  if (existingChatLink) {
  4129→+    return sendMessage(
  4130→+      chatId,
  4131→+      "Este chat já está vinculado a outra conta. Desvincule primeiro com /desvincular."
  4132→+    )
  4133→+  }
  4134→+
  4135→+  // Create link and delete token
  4136→+  try {
  4137→+    await prisma.$transaction([
  4138→+      prisma.telegramLink.create({
  4139→+        data: {
  4140→+          userId: linkToken.userId,
  4141→+          chatId: String(chatId),
  4142→+        },
  4143→+      }),
  4144→+      prisma.telegramLinkToken.delete({ where: { id: linkToken.id } }),
  4145→+    ])
  4146→+
  4147→+    return sendMessage(
  4148→+      chatId,
  4149→+      "Conta vinculada com sucesso! \n\nEnvie /menu para ver as opções disponíveis."
  4150→+    )
  4151→+  } catch (error) {
  4152→+    // Handle unique constraint violation (user already linked)
  4153→+    return sendMessage(
  4154→+      chatId,
  4155→+      "Erro ao vincular conta. Sua conta pode já estar vinculada a outro chat."
  4156→+    )
  4157→+  }
  4158→+}
  4159→+
  4160→+export async function handleUnlinkCommand(
  4161→+  chatId: number,
  4162→+  userId: string
  4163→+) {
  4164→+  await prisma.telegramLink.deleteMany({
  4165→+    where: { userId },
  4166→+  })
  4167→+
  4168→+  return sendMessage(
  4169→+    chatId,
  4170→+    "Conta desvinculada. Para vincular novamente, acesse Configurações > Telegram no app."
  4171→+  )
  4172→+}
  4173→+
  4174→+export async function handleMenuCommand(
  4175→+  chatId: number,
  4176→+  userId: string
  4177→+) {
  4178→+  return sendMessage(chatId, "📊 MyPocket - Menu", {
  4179→+    reply_markup: {
  4180→+      inline_keyboard: [
  4181→+        [{ text: "📈 Resumo do mês", callback_data: "summary:0" }],
  4182→+        [{ text: "🏷️ Gastos por categoria", callback_data: "categories:0" }],
  4183→+        [{ text: "📋 Últimas transações", callback_data: "txns:0" }],
  4184→+      ],
  4185→+    },
  4186→+  })
  4187→+}
  4188→+
  4189→+export async function handleCallbackQuery(
  4190→+  query: TelegramCallbackQuery,
  4191→+  userId: string
  4192→+) {
  4193→+  const chatId = query.message?.chat.id
  4194→+  const messageId = query.message?.message_id
  4195→+  const data = query.data || ""
  4196→+
  4197→+  if (!chatId || !messageId) return
  4198→+
  4199→+  await answerCallbackQuery(query.id)
  4200→+
  4201→+  if (data.startsWith("cancel:")) {
  4202→+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Operação cancelada.")
  4203→+  }
  4204→+
  4205→+  if (data.startsWith("confirm:")) {
  4206→+    const categoryIdFromData = data.replace("confirm:", "")
  4207→+    return handleConfirmExpense(chatId, messageId, userId, query.message!, categoryIdFromData !== "none" ? categoryIdFromData : null)
  4208→+  }
  4209→+
  4210→+  if (data.startsWith("change_cat:")) {
  4211→+    return handleShowCategories(chatId, messageId, userId, query.message)
  4212→+  }
  4213→+
  4214→+  if (data.startsWith("set_cat:")) {
  4215→+    const categoryId = data.replace("set_cat:", "")
  4216→+    return handleSetCategory(chatId, messageId, categoryId, query.message)
  4217→+  }
  4218→+
  4219→+  if (data.startsWith("csv_confirm:")) {
  4220→+    const importKey = data.replace("csv_confirm:", "")
  4221→+    return handleCsvConfirm(chatId, messageId, userId, importKey)
  4222→+  }
  4223→+
  4224→+  if (data.startsWith("csv_cancel:")) {
  4225→+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Importação cancelada.")
  4226→+  }
  4227→+
  4228→+  if (data.startsWith("summary:")) {
  4229→+    return handleSummaryQuery(chatId, userId)
  4230→+  }
  4231→+
  4232→+  if (data.startsWith("categories:")) {
  4233→+    return handleCategoryQuery(chatId, userId)
  4234→+  }
  4235→+
  4236→+  if (data.startsWith("txns:")) {
  4237→+    const offset = parseInt(data.replace("txns:", "")) || 0
  4238→+    return handleTransactionsQuery(chatId, userId, offset)
  4239→+  }
  4240→+
  4241→+  if (data.startsWith("menu:")) {
  4242→+    return handleMenuCommand(chatId, userId)

  4246→+export async function handleExpenseMessage(
  4247→+  message: TelegramMessage,
  4248→+  userId: string
  4249→+) {
  4250→+  const chatId = message.chat.id
  4251→+  const text = message.text || ""
  4252→+
  4253→+  const parsed = parseExpenseMessage(text)
  4254→+  if (!parsed) {
  4255→+    return sendMessage(
  4256→+      chatId,
  4257→+      "Não consegui entender. Envie no formato:\nDESCRICAO VALOR DD/MM/AAAA\n\nExemplo: PIX RESTAURANTE 45,90 05/03/2026"
  4258→+    )
  4259→+  }
  4260→+
  4261→+  const { description, amount, date } = parsed
  4262→+
  4263→+  // Auto-categorize
  4264→+  const suggested = await suggestCategory(description, userId)
  4265→+  const categoryName = suggested?.name || "Sem categoria"
  4266→+  const categoryId = suggested?.id || null
  4267→+
  4268→+  // Format date for display
  4269→+  const dateStr = date.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR")
  4270→+
  4271→+  const confirmData = `confirm:${categoryId || "none"}`
  4272→+  const changeCatData = `change_cat:0`
  4273→+  const cancelData = `cancel:0`
  4274→+
  4275→+  return sendMessage(chatId, [
  4276→+    "Nova despesa:",
  4277→+    `📝 ${description}`,
  4278→+    `💰 ${formatCurrency(amount)}`,
  4279→+    `📅 ${dateStr}`,
  4280→+    `🏷️ ${categoryName}`,
  4281→+  ].join("\n"), {
  4282→+    reply_markup: {
  4283→+      inline_keyboard: [
  4284→+        [
  4285→+          { text: "✅ Confirmar", callback_data: confirmData },
  4286→+          { text: "✏️ Categoria", callback_data: changeCatData },
  4287→+          { text: "❌ Cancelar", callback_data: cancelData },
  4288→+        ],
  4289→+      ],
  4290→+    },
  4291→+  })
  4292→+}
  4293→+
  4294→+async function handleConfirmExpense(
  4295→+  chatId: number,
  4296→+  messageId: number,
  4297→+  userId: string,
  4298→+  message: TelegramMessage,
  4299→+  overrideCategoryId: string | null = null
  4300→+) {
  4301→+  // Parse expense data from the confirmation message text
  4302→+  const text = message.text || ""
  4303→+  const lines = text.split("\n")
  4304→+
  4305→+  const descLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("📝"))
  4306→+  const amountLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("💰"))
  4307→+  const dateLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("📅"))
  4308→+  const catLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("🏷️"))
  4309→+
  4310→+  if (!descLine || !amountLine || !dateLine) {
  4311→+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Erro: dados da transação não encontrados.")
  4312→+  }
  4313→+
  4314→+  const description = descLine.replace("📝 ", "")
  4315→+  const amountStr = amountLine.replace("💰 ", "").replace("R$", "").replace(/\./g, "").replace(",", ".").trim()
  4316→+  const amount = parseFloat(amountStr)
  4317→+  const dateParts = dateLine.replace("📅 ", "").split("/")
  4318→+  const date = new Date(
  4319→+    parseInt(dateParts[2]),
  4320→+    parseInt(dateParts[1]) - 1,
  4321→+    parseInt(dateParts[0]),
  4322→+    12, 0, 0
  4323→+  )
  4324→+
  4325→+  // Resolve category
  4326→+  const categoryName = catLine?.replace("🏷️ ", "") || "Sem categoria"
  4327→+  let category = null
  4328→+  if (overrideCategoryId) {
  4329→+    category = await prisma.category.findUnique({ where: { id: overrideCategoryId } })
  4330→+  } else if (categoryName !== "Sem categoria") {
  4331→+    category = await prisma.category.findFirst({
  4332→+      where: { name: categoryName, userId },
  4333→+    })
  4334→+  }
  4335→+
  4336→+  // Check for duplicate
  4337→+  const duplicate = await findDuplicate({
  4338→+    userId,
  4339→+    description,
  4340→+    amount: -Math.abs(amount),
  4341→+    date,
  4342→+  })
  4343→+
  4344→+  if (duplicate) {
  4345→+    return editMessageText(
  4346→+      chatId,
  4347→+      messageId,
  4348→+      `⚠️ Transação duplicata detectada!\n\n📝 ${description}\n💰 ${formatCurrency(amount)}\n📅 ${dateLine.replace("📅 ", "")}\n\nEsta transação já existe no sistema.`
  4349→+    )
  4350→+  }
  4351→+
  4352→+  // Create transaction
  4353→+  await prisma.transaction.create({
  4354→+    data: {
  4355→+      userId,
  4356→+      description,
  4357→+      amount: -Math.abs(amount),
  4358→+      date,
  4359→+      type: "EXPENSE",
  4360→+      origin: "Telegram",
  4361→+      categoryId: category?.id || null,
  4362→+      isFixed: false,
  4363→+      isInstallment: false,
  4364→+    },
  4365→+  })
  4366→+
  4367→+  const finalCategoryName = category?.name || categoryName
  4368→+
  4369→+  return editMessageText(
  4370→+    chatId,
  4371→+    messageId,
  4372→+    `✅ Despesa registrada!\n\n📝 ${description}\n💰 ${formatCurrency(amount)}\n📅 ${dateLine.replace("📅 ", "")}\n🏷️ ${finalCategoryName}`
  4373→+  )
  4374→+}

  4376→+async function handleShowCategories(
  4377→+  chatId: number,
  4378→+  messageId: number,
  4379→+  userId: string,
  4380→+  currentMessage?: TelegramMessage
  4381→+) {
  4382→+  const categories = await prisma.category.findMany({
  4383→+    where: { userId },
  4384→+    orderBy: { name: "asc" },
  4385→+  })
  4386→+
  4387→+  if (categories.length === 0) {
  4388→+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Nenhuma categoria cadastrada.")
  4389→+  }
  4390→+
  4391→+  // Preserve expense data lines for when a category is selected
  4392→+  let expenseLines = ""
  4393→+  const msgText = currentMessage?.text || ""
  4394→+  const descLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("📝"))
  4395→+  const amountLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("💰"))
  4396→+  const dateLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("📅"))
  4397→+
  4398→+  if (descLine && amountLine && dateLine) {
  4399→+    expenseLines = `\n${descLine}\n${amountLine}\n${dateLine}`
  4400→+  }
  4401→+
  4402→+  // Build keyboard with categories (max 2 per row)
  4403→+  const keyboard: InlineKeyboardButton[][] = []
  4404→+  for (let i = 0; i < categories.length; i += 2) {
  4405→+    const row: InlineKeyboardButton[] = [
  4406→+      { text: categories[i].name, callback_data: `set_cat:${categories[i].id}` },
  4407→+    ]
  4408→+    if (i + 1 < categories.length) {
  4409→+      row.push({
  4410→+        text: categories[i + 1].name,
  4411→+        callback_data: `set_cat:${categories[i + 1].id}`,
  4412→+      })
  4413→+    }
  4414→+    keyboard.push(row)
  4415→+  }
  4416→+
  4417→+  keyboard.push([{ text: "❌ Cancelar", callback_data: "cancel:0" }])
  4418→+
  4419→+  return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, `Selecione a categoria:${expenseLines}`, {
  4420→+    reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: keyboard },
  4421→+  })
  4422→+}

  4471→+export async function handleDocumentMessage(
  4472→+  message: TelegramMessage,
  4473→+  userId: string
  4474→+) {
  4475→+  const chatId = message.chat.id
  4476→+  const doc = message.document
  4477→+
  4478→+  if (!doc) return
  4479→+
  4480→+  // Check file extension
  4481→+  const fileName = doc.file_name || ""
  4482→+  if (!fileName.toLowerCase().endsWith(".csv")) {
  4483→+    return sendMessage(chatId, "Apenas arquivos CSV são suportados.")
  4484→+  }
  4485→+
  4486→+  // Check file size (max 5MB to be safe)
  4487→+  if (doc.file_size && doc.file_size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
  4488→+    return sendMessage(chatId, "Arquivo muito grande. Máximo 5MB.")
  4489→+  }
  4490→+
  4491→+  try {
  4492→+    // Download file
  4493→+    const filePath = await getFile(doc.file_id)
  4494→+    if (!filePath) {
  4495→+      return sendMessage(chatId, "Erro ao acessar o arquivo.")
  4496→+    }
  4497→+
  4498→+    const content = await downloadFile(filePath)
  4499→+

4500→+    // Parse CSV
  4501→+    const origin = "Telegram"
  4502→+    const parsed = await parseCSV(content, origin)
  4503→+
  4504→+    if (parsed.length === 0) {
  4505→+      return sendMessage(chatId, "Nenhuma transação encontrada no arquivo.")
  4506→+    }
  4507→+
  4508→+    // Check for duplicates
  4509→+    let duplicateCount = 0
  4510→+    const uniqueTransactions: typeof parsed = []
  4511→+
  4512→+    for (const t of parsed) {
  4513→+      const amount = t.type === "EXPENSE" ? -Math.abs(t.amount) : Math.abs(t.amount)
  4514→+      const dup = await findDuplicate({
  4515→+        userId,
  4516→+        description: t.description,
  4517→+        amount,
  4518→+        date: t.date,
  4519→+      })
  4520→+      if (dup) {
  4521→+        duplicateCount++
  4522→+      } else {
  4523→+        uniqueTransactions.push(t)
  4524→+      }
  4525→+    }
  4526→+
  4527→+    if (uniqueTransactions.length === 0) {
  4528→+      return sendMessage(
  4529→+        chatId,
  4530→+        `Todas as ${parsed.length} transações já existem no sistema.`
  4531→+      )
  4532→+    }
  4533→+
  4534→+    // Store for confirmation in database
  4535→+    // Clean expired entries first
  4536→+    await prisma.telegramPendingImport.deleteMany({
  4537→+      where: { expiresAt: { lt: new Date() } },
  4538→+    })
  4539→+
  4540→+    const pendingImport = await prisma.telegramPendingImport.create({
  4541→+      data: {
  4542→+        userId,
  4543→+        chatId: String(chatId),
  4544→+        payload: JSON.stringify(uniqueTransactions.map(t => ({
  4545→+          description: t.description,
  4546→+          amount: t.amount,
  4547→+          date: t.date,
  4548→+          categoryId: t.suggestedCategoryId || null,
  4549→+          isInstallment: t.isInstallment || false,
  4550→+          currentInstallment: t.currentInstallment || null,
  4551→+          totalInstallments: t.totalInstallments || null,
  4552→+          type: t.type || "EXPENSE",
  4553→+        }))),
  4554→+        origin,
  4555→+        expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 10 * 60 * 1000),
  4556→+      },
  4557→+    })
  4558→+
  4559→+    const summaryLines = [
  4560→+      `📄 Arquivo: ${fileName}`,
  4561→+      `📊 ${parsed.length} transações encontradas`,
  4562→+    ]
  4563→+    if (duplicateCount > 0) {
  4564→+      summaryLines.push(`⚠️ ${duplicateCount} duplicatas ignoradas`)
  4565→+    }
  4566→+    summaryLines.push(`✅ ${uniqueTransactions.length} prontas para importar`)
  4567→+
  4568→+    return sendMessage(chatId, summaryLines.join("\n"), {
  4569→+      reply_markup: {
  4570→+        inline_keyboard: [
  4571→+          [
  4572→+            { text: "✅ Importar", callback_data: `csv_confirm:${pendingImport.id}` },
  4573→+            { text: "❌ Cancelar", callback_data: `csv_cancel:0` },
  4574→+          ],
  4575→+        ],
  4576→+      },
  4577→+    })
  4578→+  } catch (error) {
  4579→+    console.error("CSV import error:", error)
  4580→+    return sendMessage(
  4581→+      chatId,
  4582→+      "Erro ao processar o arquivo. Verifique se é um CSV válido (C6, Itaú ou BTG)."
  4583→+    )
  4584→+  }
  4585→+}
  4586→+
  4587→+export async function handleCsvConfirm(
  4588→+  chatId: number,
  4589→+  messageId: number,
  4590→+  userId: string,
  4591→+  importId: string
  4592→+) {
  4593→+  const pending = await prisma.telegramPendingImport.findUnique({
  4594→+    where: { id: importId },
  4595→+  })
  4596→+  if (!pending || pending.expiresAt < new Date()) {
  4597→+    if (pending) await prisma.telegramPendingImport.delete({ where: { id: importId } })
  4598→+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Importação expirada. Envie o arquivo novamente.")
  4599→+  }
  4600→+
  4601→+  await prisma.telegramPendingImport.delete({ where: { id: importId } })
  4602→+
  4603→+  const transactions = JSON.parse(pending.payload) as Array<{
  4604→+    description: string
  4605→+    amount: number
  4606→+    date: string | Date
  4607→+    categoryId: string | null
  4608→+    isInstallment: boolean
  4609→+    currentInstallment: number | null
  4610→+    totalInstallments: number | null
  4611→+    type: string
  4612→+  }>
  4613→+
  4614→+  let importedCount = 0
  4615→+  for (const t of transactions) {
  4616→+    const type = t.type || "EXPENSE"
  4617→+    let amount = t.amount
  4618→+    if (type === "EXPENSE" && amount > 0) amount = -amount
  4619→+    else if (type === "INCOME" && amount < 0) amount = Math.abs(amount)
  4620→+
  4621→+    const dateStr = typeof t.date === "string" && !(t.date as string).includes("T")
  4622→+      ? t.date + "T12:00:00"
  4623→+      : t.date
  4624→+    const transactionDate = new Date(dateStr)
  4625→+
  4626→+    await prisma.transaction.create({
  4627→+      data: {
  4628→+        userId,
  4629→+        description: t.description,
  4630→+        amount,
  4631→+        date: transactionDate,
  4632→+        type,
  4633→+        origin: pending!.origin,
  4634→+        categoryId: t.categoryId,
  4635→+        isFixed: false,
  4636→+        isInstallment: t.isInstallment,
  4637→+        currentInstallment: t.currentInstallment,
  4638→+        totalInstallments: t.totalInstallments,
  4639→+      },
  4640→+    })
  4641→+    importedCount++
  4642→+  }
  4643→+
  4644→+  return editMessageText(
  4645→+    chatId,
  4646→+    messageId,
  4647→+    `✅ ${importedCount} transações importadas com sucesso!`
  4648→+  )
  4649→+}

  4883→diff --git a/src/lib/telegram/parser.ts b/src/lib/telegram/parser.ts
  4884→new file mode 100644
  4885→index 0000000..4e568ec
  4886→--- /dev/null
  4887→+++ b/src/lib/telegram/parser.ts
  4888→@@ -0,0 +1,60 @@
  4889→+export interface ParsedExpense {
  4890→+  description: string
  4891→+  amount: number
  4892→+  date: Date
  4893→+}
  4894→+
  4895→+export function parseExpenseMessage(text: string): ParsedExpense | null {
  4896→+  const trimmed = text.trim()
  4897→+  if (!trimmed) return null
  4898→+
  4899→+  // We'll track parts to remove by position
  4900→+  const removals: Array<{ start: number; end: number }> = []
  4901→+
  4902→+  // Extract date (DD/MM/YYYY) — look for last occurrence
  4903→+  const dateRegex = /(\d{2})\/(\d{2})\/(\d{4})/g
  4904→+  let dateMatch: RegExpExecArray | null = null
  4905→+  let lastDateMatch: RegExpExecArray | null = null
  4906→+  while ((dateMatch = dateRegex.exec(trimmed)) !== null) {
  4907→+    lastDateMatch = dateMatch
  4908→+  }
  4909→+
  4910→+  let date: Date
  4911→+  if (lastDateMatch) {
  4912→+    const [, day, month, year] = lastDateMatch
  4913→+    date = new Date(parseInt(year), parseInt(month) - 1, parseInt(day), 12, 0, 0)
  4914→+    removals.push({ start: lastDateMatch.index, end: lastDateMatch.index + lastDateMatch[0].length })
  4915→+  } else {
  4916→+    const now = new Date()
  4917→+    date = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), now.getDate(), 12, 0, 0)
  4918→+  }
  4919→+
  4920→+  // Extract amount — look for Brazilian number format (last occurrence)
  4921→+  // Matches: 45,90 | 1.234,56 | 1234,56
  4922→+  const amountRegex = /(\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{3})*,\d{2}|\d+,\d{2})/g
  4923→+  let amountMatch: RegExpExecArray | null = null
  4924→+  let lastAmountMatch: RegExpExecArray | null = null
  4925→+  while ((amountMatch = amountRegex.exec(trimmed)) !== null) {
  4926→+    lastAmountMatch = amountMatch
  4927→+  }
  4928→+
  4929→+  if (!lastAmountMatch) return null
  4930→+
  4931→+  const amountStr = lastAmountMatch[1]
  4932→+  const amount = parseFloat(amountStr.replace(/\./g, "").replace(",", "."))
  4933→+  if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) return null
  4934→+
  4935→+  removals.push({ start: lastAmountMatch.index, end: lastAmountMatch.index + lastAmountMatch[0].length })
  4936→+
  4937→+  // Build description by removing matched parts by position (sorted descending to preserve indices)
  4938→+  let description = trimmed
  4939→+  removals.sort((a, b) => b.start - a.start)
  4940→+  for (const { start, end } of removals) {
  4941→+    description = description.slice(0, start) + description.slice(end)
  4942→+  }
  4943→+  description = description.replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim()
  4944→+
  4945→+  if (!description) return null
  4946→+
  4947→+  return { description, amount, date }
  4948→+}

  4955→+import prisma from "@/lib/db"

  4957→+import { sendMessage, type InlineKeyboardButton } from "./client"
  4958→+
  4959→+export async function handleSummaryQuery(chatId: number, userId: string) {
  4960→+  const now = new Date()
  4961→+  const month = now.getMonth() + 1
  4962→+  const year = now.getFullYear()
  4963→+
  4964→+  const monthStart = new Date(year, month - 1, 1)
  4965→+  const monthEnd = new Date(year, month, 0, 23, 59, 59, 999)
  4966→+
  4967→+  // Fetch transactions for current month
  4968→+  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
  4969→+    where: {
  4970→+      userId,
  4971→+      date: { gte: monthStart, lte: monthEnd },
  4972→+      deletedAt: null,
  4973→+    },
  4974→+    include: { investmentTransaction: true },
  4975→+  })
  4976→+
  4977→+  // Calculate totals (same logic as /api/summary)
  4978→+  let income = 0
  4979→+  let expense = 0
  4980→+  for (const t of transactions) {
  4981→+    if ((t as Record<string, unknown>).investmentTransaction) continue
  4982→+    if (t.type === "TRANSFER") continue
  4983→+    if (t.type === "INCOME") income += Math.abs(t.amount)
  4984→+    else if (t.type === "EXPENSE") expense += Math.abs(t.amount)
  4985→+  }
  4986→+  const balance = income - expense
  4987→+
  4988→+  // Get total budget
  4989→+  const budgets = await prisma.budget.findMany({
  4990→+    where: { userId, isActive: true },
  4991→+  })
  4992→+  const totalBudget = budgets.reduce((sum, b) => sum + b.amount, 0)
  4993→+
  4994→+  const monthName = monthStart.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", { month: "long", year: "numeric" })
  4995→+
  4996→+  const lines = [
  4997→+    `📊 Resumo - ${monthName}`,
  4998→+    "",
  4999→+    `Despesas:  ${formatCurrency(expense)}`,

5000→+    `Receitas:  ${formatCurrency(income)}`,
  5001→+    `Saldo:     ${formatCurrency(balance)}`,
  5002→+  ]
  5003→+
  5004→+  if (totalBudget > 0) {
  5005→+    const pct = Math.round((expense / totalBudget) * 100)
  5006→+    const filled = Math.round(pct / 10)
  5007→+    const bar = "█".repeat(Math.min(filled, 10)) + "░".repeat(Math.max(10 - filled, 0))
  5008→+    lines.push("")
  5009→+    lines.push(`Orçamento: ${formatCurrency(totalBudget)}`)
  5010→+    lines.push(`Usado:     ${pct}% ${bar}`)
  5011→+  }
  5012→+
  5013→+  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
  5014→+    reply_markup: {
  5015→+      inline_keyboard: [[{ text: "🔙 Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }]],
  5016→+    },
  5017→+  })
  5018→+}
  5019→+
  5020→+export async function handleCategoryQuery(chatId: number, userId: string) {
  5021→+  const now = new Date()
  5022→+  const month = now.getMonth() + 1
  5023→+  const year = now.getFullYear()
  5024→+
  5025→+  const monthStart = new Date(year, month - 1, 1)
  5026→+  const monthEnd = new Date(year, month, 0, 23, 59, 59, 999)
  5027→+
  5028→+  // Fetch expense transactions with categories
  5029→+  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
  5030→+    where: {
  5031→+      userId,
  5032→+      type: "EXPENSE",
  5033→+      date: { gte: monthStart, lte: monthEnd },
  5034→+      deletedAt: null,
  5035→+    },
  5036→+    include: { category: true },
  5037→+  })
  5038→+
  5039→+  // Aggregate by category
  5040→+  const categoryTotals = new Map<string, { name: string; total: number }>()
  5041→+  for (const t of transactions) {
  5042→+    const catName = t.category?.name || "Sem categoria"
  5043→+    const catId = t.categoryId || "none"
  5044→+    const existing = categoryTotals.get(catId) || { name: catName, total: 0 }
  5045→+    existing.total += Math.abs(t.amount)
  5046→+    categoryTotals.set(catId, existing)
  5047→+  }
  5048→+
  5049→+  // Fetch budgets
  5050→+  const budgets = await prisma.budget.findMany({
  5051→+    where: { userId, isActive: true },
  5052→+    include: { category: true },
  5053→+  })
  5054→+  const budgetMap = new Map(budgets.map(b => [b.categoryId, b.amount]))
  5055→+
  5056→+  const monthName = monthStart.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", { month: "long", year: "numeric" })
  5057→+
  5058→+  const lines = [`🏷️ Gastos por categoria - ${monthName}`, ""]
  5059→+
  5060→+  // Sort by total descending
  5061→+  const sorted = Array.from(categoryTotals.entries()).sort((a, b) => b[1].total - a[1].total)
  5062→+
  5063→+  for (const [catId, { name, total }] of sorted) {
  5064→+    const budget = budgetMap.get(catId)
  5065→+    if (budget) {
  5066→+      const pct = Math.round((total / budget) * 100)
  5067→+      const warning = pct >= 100 ? " ⚠️" : ""
  5068→+      lines.push(`${name}: ${formatCurrency(total)} / ${formatCurrency(budget)} (${pct}%)${warning}`)
  5069→+    } else {
  5070→+      lines.push(`${name}: ${formatCurrency(total)}`)
  5071→+    }
  5072→+  }
  5073→+
  5074→+  if (sorted.length === 0) {
  5075→+    lines.push("Nenhuma despesa neste mês.")
  5076→+  }
  5077→+
  5078→+  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
  5079→+    reply_markup: {
  5080→+      inline_keyboard: [[{ text: "🔙 Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }]],
  5081→+    },
  5082→+  })
  5083→+}
  5084→+
  5085→+export async function handleTransactionsQuery(
  5086→+  chatId: number,
  5087→+  userId: string,
  5088→+  offset: number = 0
  5089→+) {
  5090→+  const limit = 10
  5091→+  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
  5092→+    where: {
  5093→+      userId,
  5094→+      deletedAt: null,
  5095→+    },
  5096→+    include: { category: true },
  5097→+    orderBy: { date: "desc" },
  5098→+    skip: offset,
  5099→+    take: limit + 1, // Fetch one extra to check if there are more
  5100→+  })
  5101→+
  5102→+  const hasMore = transactions.length > limit
  5103→+  const display = transactions.slice(0, limit)
  5104→+
  5105→+  const lines = [`📋 ${offset === 0 ? "Últimas" : "Mais"} transações`, ""]
  5106→+
  5107→+  for (const t of display) {
  5108→+    const date = new Date(t.date).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", {
  5109→+      day: "2-digit",
  5110→+      month: "2-digit",
  5111→+    })
  5112→+    const sign = t.type === "INCOME" ? "+" : "-"
  5113→+    const amount = formatCurrency(Math.abs(t.amount))
  5114→+    const cat = t.category?.name || ""
  5115→+    lines.push(`${date} ${t.description.substring(0, 25)}  ${sign}${amount}  ${cat}`)
  5116→+  }
  5117→+
  5118→+  if (display.length === 0) {
  5119→+    lines.push("Nenhuma transação encontrada.")
  5120→+  }
  5121→+
  5122→+  const keyboard: InlineKeyboardButton[][] = []
  5123→+  const navRow: InlineKeyboardButton[] = []
  5124→+  if (offset > 0) {
  5125→+    navRow.push({ text: "⬅️ Anteriores", callback_data: `txns:${Math.max(0, offset - limit)}` })
  5126→+  }
  5127→+  if (hasMore) {
  5128→+    navRow.push({ text: "➡️ Próximas", callback_data: `txns:${offset + limit}` })
  5129→+  }
  5130→+  if (navRow.length > 0) keyboard.push(navRow)
  5131→+  keyboard.push([{ text: "🔙 Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }])
  5132→+
  5133→+  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
  5134→+    reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: keyboard },
  5135→+  })
  5136→+}

1→import prisma from "@/lib/db"
     2→import {
     3→  sendMessage,

     7→  downloadFile,
     8→  type TelegramMessage,
     9→  type TelegramCallbackQuery,
    10→  type InlineKeyboardButton,
    11→} from "./client"

    13→import { parseCSV } from "@/lib/csv-parser"

    17→import {

    22→
    23→export async function handleStartCommand(
    24→  message: TelegramMessage,
    25→  existingUserId: string | null
    26→) {
    27→  const chatId = message.chat.id
    28→  const text = message.text || ""
    29→  const token = text.replace("/start", "").trim()
    30→
    31→  if (!token) {
    32→    if (existingUserId) {
    33→      return sendMessage(
    34→        chatId,
    35→        "Sua conta já está vinculada! Envie /menu para ver as opções."
    36→      )
    37→    }
    38→    return sendMessage(
    39→      chatId,
    40→      "Bem-vindo ao MyPocket Bot!\n\nPara vincular sua conta, acesse Configurações > Telegram no app e clique em \"Vincular Telegram\"."
    41→    )
    42→  }
    43→
    44→  // Validate token
    45→  const linkToken = await prisma.telegramLinkToken.findUnique({
    46→    where: { token },
    47→  })
    48→
    49→  if (!linkToken) {
    50→    return sendMessage(chatId, "Token inválido. Gere um novo link nas configurações do app.")
    51→  }
    52→
    53→  if (linkToken.expiresAt < new Date()) {
    54→    await prisma.telegramLinkToken.delete({ where: { id: linkToken.id } })
    55→    return sendMessage(chatId, "Token expirado. Gere um novo link nas configurações do app.")
    56→  }
    57→
    58→  // Check if chatId already linked to another account
    59→  const existingChatLink = await prisma.telegramLink.findUnique({
    60→    where: { chatId: String(chatId) },
    61→  })
    62→  if (existingChatLink) {
    63→    return sendMessage(
    64→      chatId,
    65→      "Este chat já está vinculado a outra conta. Desvincule primeiro com /desvincular."
    66→    )
    67→  }
    68→
    69→  // Create link and delete token
    70→  try {
    71→    await prisma.$transaction([
    72→      prisma.telegramLink.create({
    73→        data: {
    74→          userId: linkToken.userId,
    75→          chatId: String(chatId),
    76→        },
    77→      }),
    78→      prisma.telegramLinkToken.delete({ where: { id: linkToken.id } }),
    79→    ])
    80→
    81→    return sendMessage(
    82→      chatId,
    83→      "Conta vinculada com sucesso! \n\nEnvie /menu para ver as opções disponíveis."
    84→    )
    85→  } catch (error) {
    86→    // Handle unique constraint violation (user already linked)
    87→    return sendMessage(
    88→      chatId,
    89→      "Erro ao vincular conta. Sua conta pode já estar vinculada a outro chat."
    90→    )
    91→  }
    92→}
    93→
    94→export async function handleUnlinkCommand(
    95→  chatId: number,
    96→  userId: string
    97→) {
    98→  await prisma.telegramLink.deleteMany({
    99→    where: { userId },
   100→  })
   101→
   102→  return sendMessage(
   103→    chatId,
   104→    "Conta desvinculada. Para vincular novamente, acesse Configurações > Telegram no app."
   105→  )
   106→}
   107→
   108→export async function handleMenuCommand(
   109→  chatId: number,
   110→  userId: string
   111→) {
   112→  return sendMessage(chatId, "📊 MyPocket - Menu", {
   113→    reply_markup: {
   114→      inline_keyboard: [
   115→        [{ text: "📈 Resumo do mês", callback_data: "summary:0" }],
   116→        [{ text: "🏷️ Gastos por categoria", callback_data: "categories:0" }],
   117→        [{ text: "📋 Últimas transações", callback_data: "txns:0" }],
   118→      ],
   119→    },
   120→  })
   121→}
   122→
   123→export async function handleCallbackQuery(
   124→  query: TelegramCallbackQuery,
   125→  userId: string
   126→) {
   127→  const chatId = query.message?.chat.id
   128→  const messageId = query.message?.message_id
   129→  const data = query.data || ""
   130→
   131→  if (!chatId || !messageId) return
   132→
   133→  await answerCallbackQuery(query.id)
   134→
   135→  if (data.startsWith("cancel:")) {
   136→    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Operação cancelada.")
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  if (data.startsWith("confirm:")) {
   140→    const categoryIdFromData = data.replace("confirm:", "")
   141→    return handleConfirmExpense(chatId, messageId, userId, query.message!, categoryIdFromData !== "none" ? categoryIdFromData : null)
   142→  }
   143→
   144→  if (data.startsWith("change_cat:")) {
   145→    return handleShowCategories(chatId, messageId, userId, query.message)
   146→  }
   147→
   148→  if (data.startsWith("set_cat:")) {
   149→    const categoryId = data.replace("set_cat:", "")
   150→    return handleSetCategory(chatId, messageId, categoryId, query.message)
   151→  }
   152→
   153→  if (data.startsWith("csv_confirm:")) {
   154→    const importKey = data.replace("csv_confirm:", "")
   155→    return handleCsvConfirm(chatId, messageId, userId, importKey)
   156→  }
   157→
   158→  if (data.startsWith("csv_cancel:")) {
   159→    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Importação cancelada.")
   160→  }
   161→
   162→  if (data.startsWith("summary:")) {
   163→    return handleSummaryQuery(chatId, userId)
   164→  }
   165→
   166→  if (data.startsWith("categories:")) {
   167→    return handleCategoryQuery(chatId, userId)
   168→  }
   169→
   170→  if (data.startsWith("txns:")) {
   171→    const offset = parseInt(data.replace("txns:", "")) || 0
   172→    return handleTransactionsQuery(chatId, userId, offset)
   173→  }
   174→
   175→  if (data.startsWith("menu:")) {
   176→    return handleMenuCommand(chatId, userId)
   177→  }
   178→}
   179→
   180→export async function handleExpenseMessage(
   181→  message: TelegramMessage,
   182→  userId: string
   183→) {
   184→  const chatId = message.chat.id
   185→  const text = message.text || ""
   186→
   187→  const parsed = parseExpenseMessage(text)
   188→  if (!parsed) {
   189→    return sendMessage(
   190→      chatId,
   191→      "Não consegui entender. Envie no formato:\nDESCRICAO VALOR DD/MM/AAAA\n\nExemplo: PIX RESTAURANTE 45,90 05/03/2026"
   192→    )
   193→  }
   194→
   195→  const { description, amount, date } = parsed
   196→
   197→  // Auto-categorize
   198→  const suggested = await suggestCategory(description, userId)
   199→  const categoryName = suggested?.name || "Sem categoria"
   200→  const categoryId = suggested?.id || null
   201→
   202→  // Format date for display
   203→  const dateStr = date.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR")
   204→
   205→  const confirmData = `confirm:${categoryId || "none"}`
   206→  const changeCatData = `change_cat:0`
   207→  const cancelData = `cancel:0`
   208→
   209→  return sendMessage(chatId, [
   210→    "Nova despesa:",
   211→    `📝 ${description}`,
   212→    `💰 ${formatCurrency(amount)}`,
   213→    `📅 ${dateStr}`,
   214→    `🏷️ ${categoryName}`,
   215→  ].join("\n"), {
   216→    reply_markup: {
   217→      inline_keyboard: [
   218→        [
   219→          { text: "✅ Confirmar", callback_data: confirmData },
   220→          { text: "✏️ Categoria", callback_data: changeCatData },
   221→          { text: "❌ Cancelar", callback_data: cancelData },
   222→        ],
   223→      ],
   224→    },
   225→  })
   226→}
   227→
   228→async function handleConfirmExpense(
   229→  chatId: number,
   230→  messageId: number,
   231→  userId: string,
   232→  message: TelegramMessage,
   233→  overrideCategoryId: string | null = null
   234→) {
   235→  // Parse expense data from the confirmation message text
   236→  const text = message.text || ""
   237→  const lines = text.split("\n")
   238→
   239→  const descLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("📝"))
   240→  const amountLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("💰"))
   241→  const dateLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("📅"))
   242→  const catLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("🏷️"))
   243→
   244→  if (!descLine || !amountLine || !dateLine) {
   245→    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Erro: dados da transação não encontrados.")
   246→  }
   247→
   248→  const description = descLine.replace("📝 ", "")
   249→  const amountStr = amountLine.replace("💰 ", "").replace("R$", "").replace(/\./g, "").replace(",", ".").trim()
   250→  const amount = parseFloat(amountStr)
   251→  const dateParts = dateLine.replace("📅 ", "").split("/")
   252→  const date = new Date(
   253→    parseInt(dateParts[2]),
   254→    parseInt(dateParts[1]) - 1,
   255→    parseInt(dateParts[0]),
   256→    12, 0, 0
   257→  )
   258→
   259→  // Resolve category
   260→  const categoryName = catLine?.replace("🏷️ ", "") || "Sem categoria"
   261→  let category = null
   262→  if (overrideCategoryId) {
   263→    category = await prisma.category.findUnique({ where: { id: overrideCategoryId } })
   264→  } else if (categoryName !== "Sem categoria") {
   265→    category = await prisma.category.findFirst({
   266→      where: { name: categoryName, userId },
   267→    })
   268→  }
   269→
   270→  // Check for duplicate
   271→  const duplicate = await findDuplicate({
   272→    userId,
   273→    description,
   274→    amount: -Math.abs(amount),
   275→    date,
   276→  })
   277→
   278→  if (duplicate) {
   279→    return editMessageText(
   280→      chatId,
   281→      messageId,
   282→      `⚠️ Transação duplicata detectada!\n\n📝 ${description}\n💰 ${formatCurrency(amount)}\n📅 ${dateLine.replace("📅 ", "")}\n\nEsta transação já existe no sistema.`
   283→    )
   284→  }
   285→
   286→  // Create transaction
   287→  await prisma.transaction.create({
   288→    data: {
   289→      userId,
   290→      description,
   291→      amount: -Math.abs(amount),
   292→      date,
   293→      type: "EXPENSE",
   294→      origin: "Telegram",
   295→      categoryId: category?.id || null,
   296→      isFixed: false,
   297→      isInstallment: false,
   298→    },
   299→  })
   300→
   301→  const finalCategoryName = category?.name || categoryName
   302→
   303→  return editMessageText(
   304→    chatId,
   305→    messageId,
   306→    `✅ Despesa registrada!\n\n📝 ${description}\n💰 ${formatCurrency(amount)}\n📅 ${dateLine.replace("📅 ", "")}\n🏷️ ${finalCategoryName}`
   307→  )
   308→}
   309→
   310→async function handleShowCategories(
   311→  chatId: number,
   312→  messageId: number,
   313→  userId: string,
   314→  currentMessage?: TelegramMessage
   315→) {
   316→  const categories = await prisma.category.findMany({
   317→    where: { userId },
   318→    orderBy: { name: "asc" },
   319→  })
   320→
   321→  if (categories.length === 0) {
   322→    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Nenhuma categoria cadastrada.")
   323→  }
   324→
   325→  // Preserve expense data lines for when a category is selected
   326→  let expenseLines = ""
   327→  const msgText = currentMessage?.text || ""
   328→  const descLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("📝"))
   329→  const amountLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("💰"))
   330→  const dateLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("📅"))
   331→
   332→  if (descLine && amountLine && dateLine) {
   333→    expenseLines = `\n${descLine}\n${amountLine}\n${dateLine}`
   334→  }
   335→
   336→  // Build keyboard with categories (max 2 per row)
   337→  const keyboard: InlineKeyboardButton[][] = []
   338→  for (let i = 0; i < categories.length; i += 2) {
   339→    const row: InlineKeyboardButton[] = [
   340→      { text: categories[i].name, callback_data: `set_cat:${categories[i].id}` },
   341→    ]
   342→    if (i + 1 < categories.length) {
   343→      row.push({
   344→        text: categories[i + 1].name,
   345→        callback_data: `set_cat:${categories[i + 1].id}`,
   346→      })
   347→    }
   348→    keyboard.push(row)
   349→  }
   350→
   351→  keyboard.push([{ text: "❌ Cancelar", callback_data: "cancel:0" }])
   352→
   353→  return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, `Selecione a categoria:${expenseLines}`, {
   354→    reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: keyboard },
   355→  })
   356→}
   357→
   358→async function handleSetCategory(
   359→  chatId: number,
   360→  messageId: number,
   361→  categoryId: string,
   362→  currentMessage?: TelegramMessage
   363→) {
   364→  const category = await prisma.category.findUnique({
   365→    where: { id: categoryId },
   366→  })
   367→
   368→  if (!category) {
   369→    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Categoria não encontrada.")
   370→  }
   371→
   372→  // Preserve original expense data lines from the message history
   373→  let expenseLines = ""
   374→  const msgText = currentMessage?.text || ""
   375→  const descLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("📝"))
   376→  const amountLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("💰"))
   377→  const dateLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("📅"))
   378→
   379→  if (descLine && amountLine && dateLine) {
   380→    expenseLines = `${descLine}\n${amountLine}\n${dateLine}\n`
   381→  }
   382→
   383→  const confirmData = `confirm:${categoryId}`
   384→  const changeCatData = `change_cat:0`
   385→  const cancelData = `cancel:0`
   386→
   387→  return editMessageText(
   388→    chatId,
   389→    messageId,
   390→    `Nova despesa:\n${expenseLines}🏷️ ${category.name}`,
   391→    {
   392→      reply_markup: {
   393→        inline_keyboard: [
   394→          [
   395→            { text: "✅ Confirmar", callback_data: confirmData },
   396→            { text: "✏️ Categoria", callback_data: changeCatData },
   397→            { text: "❌ Cancelar", callback_data: cancelData },
   398→          ],
   399→        ],
   400→      },
   401→    }
   402→  )
   403→}
   404→
   405→export async function handleDocumentMessage(
   406→  message: TelegramMessage,
   407→  userId: string
   408→) {
   409→  const chatId = message.chat.id
   410→  const doc = message.document
   411→
   412→  if (!doc) return
   413→
   414→  // Check file extension
   415→  const fileName = doc.file_name || ""
   416→  if (!fileName.toLowerCase().endsWith(".csv")) {
   417→    return sendMessage(chatId, "Apenas arquivos CSV são suportados.")
   418→  }
   419→
   420→  // Check file size (max 5MB to be safe)
   421→  if (doc.file_size && doc.file_size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
   422→    return sendMessage(chatId, "Arquivo muito grande. Máximo 5MB.")
   423→  }
   424→
   425→  try {
   426→    // Download file
   427→    const filePath = await getFile(doc.file_id)
   428→    if (!filePath) {
   429→      return sendMessage(chatId, "Erro ao acessar o arquivo.")
   430→    }
   431→
   432→    const content = await downloadFile(filePath)
   433→
   434→    // Parse CSV
   435→    const origin = "Telegram"
   436→    const parsed = await parseCSV(content, origin)
   437→
   438→    if (parsed.length === 0) {
   439→      return sendMessage(chatId, "Nenhuma transação encontrada no arquivo.")
   440→    }
   441→
   442→    // Check for duplicates
   443→    let duplicateCount = 0
   444→    const uniqueTransactions: typeof parsed = []
   445→
   446→    for (const t of parsed) {
   447→      const amount = t.type === "EXPENSE" ? -Math.abs(t.amount) : Math.abs(t.amount)
   448→      const dup = await findDuplicate({
   449→        userId,
   450→        description: t.description,
   451→        amount,
   452→        date: t.date,
   453→      })
   454→      if (dup) {
   455→        duplicateCount++
   456→      } else {
   457→        uniqueTransactions.push(t)
   458→      }
   459→    }
   460→
   461→    if (uniqueTransactions.length === 0) {
   462→      return sendMessage(
   463→        chatId,
   464→        `Todas as ${parsed.length} transações já existem no sistema.`
   465→      )
   466→    }
   467→
   468→    // Store for confirmation in database
   469→    // Clean expired entries first
   470→    await prisma.telegramPendingImport.deleteMany({
   471→      where: { expiresAt: { lt: new Date() } },
   472→    })
   473→
   474→    const pendingImport = await prisma.telegramPendingImport.create({
   475→      data: {
   476→        userId,
   477→        chatId: String(chatId),
   478→        payload: JSON.stringify(uniqueTransactions.map(t => ({
   479→          description: t.description,
   480→          amount: t.amount,
   481→          date: t.date,
   482→          categoryId: t.suggestedCategoryId || null,
   483→          isInstallment: t.isInstallment || false,
   484→          currentInstallment: t.currentInstallment || null,
   485→          totalInstallments: t.totalInstallments || null,
   486→          type: t.type || "EXPENSE",
   487→        }))),
   488→        origin,
   489→        expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 10 * 60 * 1000),
   490→      },
   491→    })
   492→
   493→    const summaryLines = [
   494→      `📄 Arquivo: ${fileName}`,
   495→      `📊 ${parsed.length} transações encontradas`,
   496→    ]
   497→    if (duplicateCount > 0) {
   498→      summaryLines.push(`⚠️ ${duplicateCount} duplicatas ignoradas`)
   499→    }
   500→    summaryLines.push(`✅ ${uniqueTransactions.length} prontas para importar`)
   501→
   502→    return sendMessage(chatId, summaryLines.join("\n"), {
   503→      reply_markup: {
   504→        inline_keyboard: [
   505→          [
   506→            { text: "✅ Importar", callback_data: `csv_confirm:${pendingImport.id}` },
   507→            { text: "❌ Cancelar", callback_data: `csv_cancel:0` },
   508→          ],
   509→        ],
   510→      },
   511→    })
   512→  } catch (error) {
   513→    console.error("CSV import error:", error)
   514→    return sendMessage(
   515→      chatId,
   516→      "Erro ao processar o arquivo. Verifique se é um CSV válido (C6, Itaú ou BTG)."
   517→    )
   518→  }
   519→}
   520→
   521→export async function handleCsvConfirm(
   522→  chatId: number,
   523→  messageId: number,
   524→  userId: string,
   525→  importId: string
   526→) {
   527→  const pending = await prisma.telegramPendingImport.findUnique({
   528→    where: { id: importId },
   529→  })
   530→  if (!pending || pending.expiresAt < new Date()) {
   531→    if (pending) await prisma.telegramPendingImport.delete({ where: { id: importId } })
   532→    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Importação expirada. Envie o arquivo novamente.")
   533→  }
   534→
   535→  await prisma.telegramPendingImport.delete({ where: { id: importId } })
   536→
   537→  const transactions = JSON.parse(pending.payload) as Array<{
   538→    description: string
   539→    amount: number
   540→    date: string | Date
   541→    categoryId: string | null
   542→    isInstallment: boolean
   543→    currentInstallment: number | null
   544→    totalInstallments: number | null
   545→    type: string
   546→  }>
   547→
   548→  let importedCount = 0
   549→  for (const t of transactions) {
   550→    const type = t.type || "EXPENSE"
   551→    let amount = t.amount
   552→    if (type === "EXPENSE" && amount > 0) amount = -amount
   553→    else if (type === "INCOME" && amount < 0) amount = Math.abs(amount)
   554→
   555→    const dateStr = typeof t.date === "string" && !(t.date as string).includes("T")
   556→      ? t.date + "T12:00:00"
   557→      : t.date
   558→    const transactionDate = new Date(dateStr)
   559→
   560→    await prisma.transaction.create({
   561→      data: {
   562→        userId,
   563→        description: t.description,
   564→        amount,
   565→        date: transactionDate,
   566→        type,
   567→        origin: pending!.origin,
   568→        categoryId: t.categoryId,
   569→        isFixed: false,
   570→        isInstallment: t.isInstallment,
   571→        currentInstallment: t.currentInstallment,
   572→        totalInstallments: t.totalInstallments,
   573→      },
   574→    })
   575→    importedCount++
   576→  }
   577→
   578→  return editMessageText(
   579→    chatId,
   580→    messageId,
   581→    `✅ ${importedCount} transações importadas com sucesso!`
   582→  )
   583→}
   584→

1→import type { NextAuthConfig } from "next-auth"
     2→
     3→// Edge-compatible config (used by middleware)
     4→// This file should NOT import Prisma or bcrypt (not edge-compatible)
     5→export const authConfig = {
     6→  pages: {
     7→    signIn: "/auth/login",
     8→    error: "/auth/error",
     9→  },
    10→  callbacks: {
    11→    authorized({ auth, request: { nextUrl } }) {
    12→      const isLoggedIn = !!auth?.user
    13→      const isOnAuthPage = nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/auth")
    14→      const isApiAuthRoute = nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/api/auth")
    15→      const isLandingPage = nextUrl.pathname === "/"
    16→      const isTelegramWebhook = nextUrl.pathname === "/api/telegram/webhook"
    17→
    18→      // Allow landing page, auth pages, auth API routes, and Telegram webhook without authentication
    19→      if (isLandingPage || isOnAuthPage || isApiAuthRoute || isTelegramWebhook) {
    20→        return true
    21→      }
    22→
    23→      // Redirect to login if not authenticated
    24→      if (!isLoggedIn) {
    25→        return false
    26→      }
    27→
    28→      return true
    29→    },
    30→  },
    31→  providers: [], // Providers are added in auth.ts
    32→} satisfies NextAuthConfig
    33→

1→import prisma from "@/lib/db"
     2→import { formatCurrency } from "@/lib/utils"
     3→import { sendMessage, type InlineKeyboardButton } from "./client"
     4→
     5→export async function handleSummaryQuery(chatId: number, userId: string) {
     6→  const now = new Date()
     7→  const month = now.getMonth() + 1
     8→  const year = now.getFullYear()
     9→
    10→  const monthStart = new Date(year, month - 1, 1)
    11→  const monthEnd = new Date(year, month, 0, 23, 59, 59, 999)
    12→
    13→  // Fetch transactions for current month
    14→  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
    15→    where: {
    16→      userId,
    17→      date: { gte: monthStart, lte: monthEnd },
    18→      deletedAt: null,
    19→    },
    20→    include: { investmentTransaction: true },
    21→  })
    22→
    23→  // Calculate totals (same logic as /api/summary)
    24→  let income = 0
    25→  let expense = 0
    26→  for (const t of transactions) {
    27→    if ((t as Record<string, unknown>).investmentTransaction) continue
    28→    if (t.type === "TRANSFER") continue
    29→    if (t.type === "INCOME") income += Math.abs(t.amount)
    30→    else if (t.type === "EXPENSE") expense += Math.abs(t.amount)
    31→  }
    32→  const balance = income - expense
    33→
    34→  // Get total budget
    35→  const budgets = await prisma.budget.findMany({
    36→    where: { userId, isActive: true },
    37→  })
    38→  const totalBudget = budgets.reduce((sum, b) => sum + b.amount, 0)
    39→
    40→  const monthName = monthStart.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", { month: "long", year: "numeric" })
    41→
    42→  const lines = [
    43→    `📊 Resumo - ${monthName}`,
    44→    "",
    45→    `Despesas:  ${formatCurrency(expense)}`,
    46→    `Receitas:  ${formatCurrency(income)}`,
    47→    `Saldo:     ${formatCurrency(balance)}`,
    48→  ]
    49→
    50→  if (totalBudget > 0) {
    51→    const pct = Math.round((expense / totalBudget) * 100)
    52→    const filled = Math.round(pct / 10)
    53→    const bar = "█".repeat(Math.min(filled, 10)) + "░".repeat(Math.max(10 - filled, 0))
    54→    lines.push("")
    55→    lines.push(`Orçamento: ${formatCurrency(totalBudget)}`)
    56→    lines.push(`Usado:     ${pct}% ${bar}`)
    57→  }
    58→
    59→  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
    60→    reply_markup: {
    61→      inline_keyboard: [[{ text: "🔙 Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }]],
    62→    },
    63→  })
    64→}
    65→
    66→export async function handleCategoryQuery(chatId: number, userId: string) {
    67→  const now = new Date()
    68→  const month = now.getMonth() + 1
    69→  const year = now.getFullYear()
    70→
    71→  const monthStart = new Date(year, month - 1, 1)
    72→  const monthEnd = new Date(year, month, 0, 23, 59, 59, 999)
    73→
    74→  // Fetch expense transactions with categories
    75→  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
    76→    where: {
    77→      userId,
    78→      type: "EXPENSE",
    79→      date: { gte: monthStart, lte: monthEnd },
    80→      deletedAt: null,
    81→    },
    82→    include: { category: true },
    83→  })
    84→
    85→  // Aggregate by category
    86→  const categoryTotals = new Map<string, { name: string; total: number }>()
    87→  for (const t of transactions) {
    88→    const catName = t.category?.name || "Sem categoria"
    89→    const catId = t.categoryId || "none"
    90→    const existing = categoryTotals.get(catId) || { name: catName, total: 0 }
    91→    existing.total += Math.abs(t.amount)
    92→    categoryTotals.set(catId, existing)
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  // Fetch budgets
    96→  const budgets = await prisma.budget.findMany({
    97→    where: { userId, isActive: true },
    98→    include: { category: true },
    99→  })
   100→  const budgetMap = new Map(budgets.map(b => [b.categoryId, b.amount]))
   101→
   102→  const monthName = monthStart.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", { month: "long", year: "numeric" })
   103→
   104→  const lines = [`🏷️ Gastos por categoria - ${monthName}`, ""]
   105→
   106→  // Sort by total descending
   107→  const sorted = Array.from(categoryTotals.entries()).sort((a, b) => b[1].total - a[1].total)
   108→
   109→  for (const [catId, { name, total }] of sorted) {
   110→    const budget = budgetMap.get(catId)
   111→    if (budget) {
   112→      const pct = Math.round((total / budget) * 100)
   113→      const warning = pct >= 100 ? " ⚠️" : ""
   114→      lines.push(`${name}: ${formatCurrency(total)} / ${formatCurrency(budget)} (${pct}%)${warning}`)
   115→    } else {
   116→      lines.push(`${name}: ${formatCurrency(total)}`)
   117→    }
   118→  }
   119→
   120→  if (sorted.length === 0) {
   121→    lines.push("Nenhuma despesa neste mês.")
   122→  }
   123→
   124→  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
   125→    reply_markup: {
   126→      inline_keyboard: [[{ text: "🔙 Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }]],
   127→    },
   128→  })
   129→}
   130→
   131→export async function handleTransactionsQuery(
   132→  chatId: number,
   133→  userId: string,
   134→  offset: number = 0
   135→) {
   136→  const limit = 10
   137→  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
   138→    where: {
   139→      userId,
   140→      deletedAt: null,
   141→    },
   142→    include: { category: true },
   143→    orderBy: { date: "desc" },
   144→    skip: offset,
   145→    take: limit + 1, // Fetch one extra to check if there are more
   146→  })
   147→
   148→  const hasMore = transactions.length > limit
   149→  const display = transactions.slice(0, limit)
   150→
   151→  const lines = [`📋 ${offset === 0 ? "Últimas" : "Mais"} transações`, ""]
   152→
   153→  for (const t of display) {
   154→    const date = new Date(t.date).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", {
   155→      day: "2-digit",
   156→      month: "2-digit",
   157→    })
   158→    const sign = t.type === "INCOME" ? "+" : "-"
   159→    const amount = formatCurrency(Math.abs(t.amount))
   160→    const cat = t.category?.name || ""
   161→    lines.push(`${date} ${t.description.substring(0, 25)}  ${sign}${amount}  ${cat}`)
   162→  }
   163→
   164→  if (display.length === 0) {
   165→    lines.push("Nenhuma transação encontrada.")
   166→  }
   167→
   168→  const keyboard: InlineKeyboardButton[][] = []
   169→  const navRow: InlineKeyboardButton[] = []
   170→  if (offset > 0) {
   171→    navRow.push({ text: "⬅️ Anteriores", callback_data: `txns:${Math.max(0, offset - limit)}` })
   172→  }
   173→  if (hasMore) {
   174→    navRow.push({ text: "➡️ Próximas", callback_data: `txns:${offset + limit}` })
   175→  }
   176→  if (navRow.length > 0) keyboard.push(navRow)
   177→  keyboard.push([{ text: "🔙 Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }])
   178→
   179→  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
   180→    reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: keyboard },
   181→  })
   182→}
   183→

1→import prisma from "@/lib/db"
     2→
     3→export interface DuplicateCheckParams {
     4→  userId: string
     5→  description: string
     6→  amount: number
     7→  date: Date
     8→}
     9→
    10→export async function findDuplicate({
    11→  userId,
    12→  description,
    13→  amount,
    14→  date,
    15→}: DuplicateCheckParams) {
    16→  // Normalize date to start/end of day
    17→  const dayStart = new Date(date)
    18→  dayStart.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
    19→  const dayEnd = new Date(date)
    20→  dayEnd.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999)
    21→
    22→  const duplicate = await prisma.transaction.findFirst({
    23→    where: {
    24→      userId,
    25→      description: {
    26→        equals: description.trim(),
    27→        mode: "insensitive",
    28→      },
    29→      amount,
    30→      date: {
    31→        gte: dayStart,
    32→        lte: dayEnd,
    33→      },
    34→      deletedAt: null,
    35→    },
    36→  })
    37→
    38→  return duplicate
    39→}
    40→
    41→export async function filterDuplicates(
    42→  userId: string,
    43→  transactions: Array<{ description: string; amount: number; date: Date }>
    44→): Promise<{ unique: typeof transactions; duplicateCount: number }> {
    45→  const unique: typeof transactions = []
    46→  let duplicateCount = 0
    47→
    48→  for (const t of transactions) {
    49→    const dup = await findDuplicate({
    50→      userId,
    51→      description: t.description,
    52→      amount: t.amount,
    53→      date: t.date,
    54→    })
    55→    if (dup) {
    56→      duplicateCount++
    57→    } else {
    58→      unique.push(t)
    59→    }
    60→  }
    61→
    62→  return { unique, duplicateCount }
    63→}
    64→

Now I have all the context. Let me make the fixes:

**CRITICAL:**
1. `handleCsvConfirm` - add userId validation
2. Webhook secret - use timing-safe comparison
3. `/api/telegram/setup` - add middleware exception

**IMPORTANT:**
4. `client.ts` - lazy eval of TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
5. `handleConfirmExpense` - store expense data instead of parsing from message text (this is a bigger change, let me think about a simpler approach)
6. `handleSetCategory` - validate category belongs to user
7. Import via bot without importBatchId/recurring matching (bigger refactor - let me think about scope)


8. N+1 queries in dedup

For #5, the simplest fix without schema changes is to reuse TelegramPendingImport for single expenses too, since callback_data is limited to 64 bytes and encoding the data there won't work. Let me focus on what the user actually asked for—the critical and important fixes.

For #5, I need to make the message parsing more robust against `NaN` errors from format changes, or store the data in TelegramPendingImport. For #7, extracting a shared import service is too big a refactor, so I'll add importBatchId at minimum and note the rest as a TODO. For #8, I can implement batch dedup to fix the N+1 problem.

Now I'm mapping out the specific changes: adding timing-safe equality checks to the webhook route, excluding the Telegram setup endpoint from auth, validating user IDs in the CSV confirmation handler, lazy-loading the Telegram API client, and continuing through the remaining fixes.

For the expense confirmation handler, storing the parsed data in TelegramPendingImport when the message first arrives, then retrieving it on confirm, avoids re-parsing from text. For the category handler, I need to thread the userId through the function call chain to properly filter categories by user.

I'll add a unique batch ID to the CSV import flow and create a batch deduplication function to catch duplicates within the same import. Now I'm ready to start implementing these changes.

1→import prisma from "@/lib/db"
     2→import { sendMessage, type TelegramUpdate } from "./client"
     3→
     4→export async function handleUpdate(update: TelegramUpdate) {
     5→  const chatId =
     6→    update.message?.chat.id ??
     7→    update.callback_query?.message?.chat.id
     8→
     9→  if (!chatId) return
    10→
    11→  // Look up linked user
    12→  const link = await prisma.telegramLink.findUnique({
    13→    where: { chatId: String(chatId) },
    14→  })
    15→
    16→  // Handle /start command (linking) — always allowed, even without link
    17→  if (update.message?.text?.startsWith("/start")) {
    18→    const { handleStartCommand } = await import("./commands")
    19→    return handleStartCommand(update.message, link?.userId ?? null)
    20→  }
    21→
    22→  // All other commands require a linked account
    23→  if (!link) {
    24→    return sendMessage(
    25→      chatId,
    26→      "Conta não vinculada. Acesse as configurações do MyPocket para vincular sua conta."
    27→    )
    28→  }
    29→
    30→  const userId = link.userId
    31→
    32→  // Route callback queries (inline keyboard buttons)
    33→  if (update.callback_query) {
    34→    const { handleCallbackQuery } = await import("./commands")
    35→    return handleCallbackQuery(update.callback_query, userId)
    36→  }
    37→
    38→  // Route text messages
    39→  if (update.message?.text) {
    40→    const text = update.message.text
    41→
    42→    if (text === "/menu") {
    43→      const { handleMenuCommand } = await import("./commands")
    44→      return handleMenuCommand(chatId, userId)
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    if (text === "/desvincular") {
    48→      const { handleUnlinkCommand } = await import("./commands")
    49→      return handleUnlinkCommand(chatId, userId)
    50→    }
    51→
    52→    // Default: try to parse as expense
    53→    const { handleExpenseMessage } = await import("./commands")
    54→    return handleExpenseMessage(update.message, userId)
    55→  }
    56→
    57→  // Route document messages (CSV files)
    58→  if (update.message?.document) {
    59→    const { handleDocumentMessage } = await import("./commands")
    60→    return handleDocumentMessage(update.message, userId)
    61→  }
    62→}
    63→

generator client {
  provider        = "prisma-client-js"
  previewFeatures = ["driverAdapters"]
  output          = "../node_modules/.prisma/client"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// ==========================================
// AUTH.JS MODELS
// ==========================================

model User {
  id             String    @id @default(cuid())
  name           String?
  email          String    @unique
  emailVerified  DateTime?
  hashedPassword String?
  image          String?
  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime  @updatedAt

  accounts          Account[]
  sessions          Session[]
  transactions      Transaction[]
  categories        Category[]
  recurringExpenses RecurringExpense[]
  installments      Installment[]
  origins           Origin[]
  budgets           Budget[]
  categoryRules     CategoryRule[]
  categoryTags      CategoryTag[]
  settings          Settings[]
  savingsHistories  SavingsHistory[]

  // Investment models
  investmentCategories  InvestmentCategory[]
  investments           Investment[]
  investmentSnapshots   InvestmentSnapshot[]

  // Bill payment models
  billPayments          BillPayment[]

  // Simulation models
  simulations           Simulation[]

  // Telegram integration

considera esses findings abaixo também e corrija caso já não estejam:

1. Major: o fluxo de CSV do Telegram grava todas as transações com `origin = "Telegram"`, então o usuário perde a origem real da fatura/cartão e quebra toda a lógica que depende disso. O import web detecta e preserva algo como `Cartao C6` / `Cartao Itau` / `Cartao BTG`, enquanto o bot fixa `"Telegram"` ao criar o pending import e persiste esse valor no confirm. Isso afeta filtros/relatórios por origem e também inviabiliza o matcher de recorrentes do import normal, que exige igualdade exata de origem. Referências: [src/lib/telegram/commands.ts:435](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/lib/telegram/commands.ts#L435), [src/lib/telegram/commands.ts:567](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/lib/telegram/commands.ts#L567), [src/app/import/page.tsx:404](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/app/import/page.tsx#L404), [src/app/api/import/route.ts:101](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/app/api/import/route.ts#L101), [src/app/api/import/route.ts:118](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/app/api/import/route.ts#L118).

2. Major: `handleCsvConfirm` não reutiliza a pipeline de `/api/import`; ele faz `transaction.create` direto com `isFixed: false` e sem `recurringExpenseId`, e nunca roda a lógica de carryover. Na prática, o mesmo CSV importado pelo app web e pelo bot terá comportamento diferente: recorrentes não serão vinculadas e saldos rolados não serão reconciliados no caminho do Telegram. Referências: [src/lib/telegram/commands.ts:548](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/lib/telegram/commands.ts#L548), [src/lib/telegram/commands.ts:569](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/lib/telegram/commands.ts#L569), [src/app/api/import/route.ts:103](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/app/api/import/route.ts#L103), [src/app/api/import/route.ts:190](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/app/api/import/route.ts#L190), [src/app/api/import/route.ts:203](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/app/api/import/route.ts#L203).

3. Major: a autocategorização do CSV via Telegram ignora as regras do usuário atual. `parseCSV()` chama `suggestCategory(parsed.description)` sem `userId`, mas `suggestCategory` é explicitamente user-scoped quando recebe esse parâmetro. Resultado: importações pelo bot podem vir sem categoria mesmo quando o mesmo lançamento seria categorizado corretamente no fluxo web. Referências: [src/lib/csv-parser.ts:198](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/lib/csv-parser.ts#L198), [src/lib/categorizer.ts:95](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/lib/categorizer.ts#L95), [src/app/import/page.tsx:455](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/app/import/page.tsx#L455).

4. Medium: os callbacks de troca/confirmação de categoria não validam posse da categoria pelo usuário. Tanto `handleSetCategory` quanto o branch `overrideCategoryId` de `handleConfirmExpense` fazem lookup por `id` global, sem `userId`. Se alguém conseguir enviar um `callback_data` forjado com um `categoryId` válido de outro usuário, o bot aceita esse vínculo e grava a transação com uma categoria alheia, o que viola isolamento de dados. Referências: [src/lib/telegram/commands.ts:263](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/lib/telegram/commands.ts#L263), [src/lib/telegram/commands.ts:364](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/lib/telegram/commands.ts#L364), [prisma/schema.prisma:179](/Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/prisma/schema.prisma#L179).

Assumptions:
- O workspace ficou com mudanças locais não commitadas nesses arquivos durante a revisão; por isso baseei os findings no conteúdo commitado de `pr-12`, não no working tree atual.
- Não consegui executar a suíte local porque as dependências do projeto não estão instaladas neste workspace (`node_modules` ausente).

   448→
   449→export async function handleDocumentMessage(

449→export async function handleDocumentMessage(
   450→  message: TelegramMessage,
   451→  userId: string
   452→) {
   453→  const chatId = message.chat.id
   454→  const doc = message.document
   455→
   456→  if (!doc) return
   457→
   458→  // Check file extension
   459→  const fileName = doc.file_name || ""
   460→  if (!fileName.toLowerCase().endsWith(".csv")) {
   461→    return sendMessage(chatId, "Apenas arquivos CSV são suportados.")
   462→  }
   463→
   464→  // Check file size (max 5MB to be safe)
   465→  if (doc.file_size && doc.file_size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
   466→    return sendMessage(chatId, "Arquivo muito grande. Máximo 5MB.")
   467→  }
   468→
   469→  try {
   470→    // Download file
   471→    const filePath = await getFile(doc.file_id)
   472→    if (!filePath) {
   473→      return sendMessage(chatId, "Erro ao acessar o arquivo.")
   474→    }
   475→
   476→    const content = await downloadFile(filePath)
   477→
   478→    // Parse CSV
   479→    const origin = "Telegram"
   480→    const parsed = await parseCSV(content, origin)
   481→
   482→    if (parsed.length === 0) {
   483→      return sendMessage(chatId, "Nenhuma transação encontrada no arquivo.")
   484→    }
   485→
   486→    // Check for duplicates (batch query instead of N+1)
   487→    const transactionsWithSignedAmount = parsed.map(t => ({
   488→      ...t,
   489→      amount: t.type === "EXPENSE" ? -Math.abs(t.amount) : Math.abs(t.amount),
   490→    }))
   491→    const { unique: uniqueTransactions, duplicateCount } = await filterDuplicates(
   492→      userId,
   493→      transactionsWithSignedAmount
   494→    )
   495→
   496→    if (uniqueTransactions.length === 0) {
   497→      return sendMessage(
   498→        chatId,
   499→        `Todas as ${parsed.length} transações já existem no sistema.`
   500→      )
   501→    }
   502→
   503→    // Store for confirmation in database
   504→    // Clean expired entries first
   505→    await prisma.telegramPendingImport.deleteMany({
   506→      where: { expiresAt: { lt: new Date() } },
   507→    })
   508→
   509→    const pendingImport = await prisma.telegramPendingImport.create({
   510→      data: {
   511→        userId,
   512→        chatId: String(chatId),
   513→        payload: JSON.stringify(uniqueTransactions.map(t => ({
   514→          description: t.description,
   515→          amount: t.amount,
   516→          date: t.date,
   517→          categoryId: t.suggestedCategoryId || null,
   518→          isInstallment: t.isInstallment || false,
   519→          currentInstallment: t.currentInstallment || null,
   520→          totalInstallments: t.totalInstallments || null,
   521→          type: t.type || "EXPENSE",
   522→        }))),
   523→        origin,
   524→        expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 10 * 60 * 1000),
   525→      },
   526→    })
   527→
   528→    const summaryLines = [
   529→      `📄 Arquivo: ${fileName}`,
   530→      `📊 ${parsed.length} transações encontradas`,
   531→    ]
   532→    if (duplicateCount > 0) {
   533→      summaryLines.push(`⚠️ ${duplicateCount} duplicatas ignoradas`)
   534→    }
   535→    summaryLines.push(`✅ ${uniqueTransactions.length} prontas para importar`)
   536→
   537→    return sendMessage(chatId, summaryLines.join("\n"), {
   538→      reply_markup: {
   539→        inline_keyboard: [
   540→          [
   541→            { text: "✅ Importar", callback_data: `csv_confirm:${pendingImport.id}` },
   542→            { text: "❌ Cancelar", callback_data: `csv_cancel:0` },
   543→          ],
   544→        ],
   545→      },
   546→    })
   547→  } catch (error) {
   548→    console.error("CSV import error:", error)

549→    return sendMessage(
   550→      chatId,
   551→      "Erro ao processar o arquivo. Verifique se é um CSV válido (C6, Itaú ou BTG)."
   552→    )
   553→  }
   554→}
   555→
   556→export async function handleCsvConfirm(
   557→  chatId: number,
   558→  messageId: number,
   559→  userId: string,
   560→  importId: string
   561→) {
   562→  const pending = await prisma.telegramPendingImport.findUnique({
   563→    where: { id: importId },
   564→  })
   565→  if (!pending || pending.expiresAt < new Date()) {
   566→    if (pending) await prisma.telegramPendingImport.delete({ where: { id: importId } })
   567→    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Importação expirada. Envie o arquivo novamente.")
   568→  }
   569→
   570→  // Validate that the pending import belongs to the requesting user
   571→  if (pending.userId !== userId) {
   572→    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Erro: importação não encontrada.")
   573→  }
   574→
   575→  await prisma.telegramPendingImport.delete({ where: { id: importId } })
   576→
   577→  const transactions = JSON.parse(pending.payload) as Array<{
   578→    description: string
   579→    amount: number
   580→    date: string | Date
   581→    categoryId: string | null
   582→    isInstallment: boolean
   583→    currentInstallment: number | null
   584→    totalInstallments: number | null
   585→    type: string
   586→  }>
   587→
   588→  let importedCount = 0
   589→  for (const t of transactions) {
   590→    const type = t.type || "EXPENSE"
   591→    let amount = t.amount
   592→    if (type === "EXPENSE" && amount > 0) amount = -amount
   593→    else if (type === "INCOME" && amount < 0) amount = Math.abs(amount)
   594→
   595→    const dateStr = typeof t.date === "string" && !(t.date as string).includes("T")
   596→      ? t.date + "T12:00:00"
   597→      : t.date
   598→    const transactionDate = new Date(dateStr)

598→    const transactionDate = new Date(dateStr)
   599→
   600→    await prisma.transaction.create({
   601→      data: {
   602→        userId,
   603→        description: t.description,
   604→        amount,
   605→        date: transactionDate,
   606→        type,
   607→        origin: pending.origin,
   608→        categoryId: t.categoryId,
   609→        isFixed: false,
   610→        isInstallment: t.isInstallment,
   611→        currentInstallment: t.currentInstallment,
   612→        totalInstallments: t.totalInstallments,
   613→      },
   614→    })
   615→    importedCount++
   616→  }
   617→
   618→  return editMessageText(
   619→    chatId,
   620→    messageId,
   621→    `✅ ${importedCount} transações importadas com sucesso!`
   622→  )
   623→}

content.thinking:
Now I understand the three findings:

1. **Origin hardcoded as "Telegram"** — `detectBankFromContent` exists in csv-parser.ts but isn't used by the bot. I should use it to detect the real origin from the CSV content.

2. **handleCsvConfirm doesn't reuse import pipeline** — The bot's CSV confirm creates transactions directly without recurring expense matching, carryover detection, etc. The proper fix is to extract the import logic from the API route into a shared service function, then call it from both places.

3. **parseCSV autocategorization without userId** — `parseCSV` calls `suggestCategory(parsed.description)` without userId. 

For the fixes, I need to use `detectBankFromContent` to get the actual bank instead of hardcoding "Telegram", extract the import logic from the API route into a shared service so both the bot and API use the same pipeline, and handle category suggestions with userId either by passing it through to parseCSV or re-categorizing after parsing in the bot.

Looking at what the import route actually does—recurring expense matching, dedup checking, category validation, transaction creation with all the metadata, and carryover linking—extracting this into a shared service is the right move. I'll create that service module with the core import logic.

Vou fazer as correções. O finding 2 é o mais significativo — extrair a lógica de import para um serviço compartilhado.

content.text:
Base directory for this skill: /Users/victor/.claude/skills/committing-changes

# Committing Changes

Create git commits for changes made during this session.

## Process

1. **Analyze changes:**
   - Run `git status` and `git diff` to understand modifications
   - Consider whether changes should be one or multiple logical commits

2. **Plan commits:**
   - Group related files together
   - Draft clear commit messages in imperative mood
   - Focus on why changes were made

3. **Execute upon confirmation:**
   - Use `git add` with specific files (never `-A` or `.`)
   - Create commits with `git commit -n -m "message"`
   - Show result with `git log --oneline -n [N]`

## Critical Rules

- **NEVER add Claude attribution** - no co-author lines, no "Generated with Claude"
- Write commit messages as if the user wrote them
- Keep commits atomic and focused
